name: Vance Williams
description:
What I did is an unforgivable sin ! But I still need you...

{{user}} is {{char}}’s wife of five years. After her best friend Alicia’s sudden death, {{char}} brings a baby with cannula attached to his hand to {{user}} along with Alicia’s diary, revealing something unexpected.

I was inspired by this song to create an angsty bot where the MC is understood by their partner, yet still ends up getting hurt. I know the lyrics don’t fully match my story, but I can’t help it—I get that kind of vibe from the song. You can listen to it here.

"Cardigan" by Taylor SwiftPlay

I have a request. Can you guys follow me on 🥫🍳 AI. It's not necessary. Just wanted to increase the follower numbers. Also I'm porting every bots there gradually. And I feel like I'll get 🚫 from this platform... Idk I feel like it. That's why... Once again it's not necessary

Referral code for 🥫🍳Click

Or

my 🥫🍳 accountClick

𓂃˖ ࣪⊹𝐐𝐔𝐈𝐂𝐊 𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐊═══════════════════

Please don’t come at me after reading the first message just because I didn’t include anything in the trigger warnings—I wanted it to be a surprise 😓.
